headline: United Rentals Recognized for Workplace Excellence
summary: STAMFORD, Conn., May 28, 2026--United Rentals, Inc. (NYSE: URI), the world's largest equipment rental company, today announced it has been recognized with multiple industry awards honoring its commitment to creating an exceptional workplace and supporting the growth and success of its people.
